title: Pilbara Minerals reports steady spodumene shipments from Pilgangoora
summary: Pilbara Minerals said Pilgangoora shipments remained stable while customers continued to negotiate shorter offtake windows.

title: Australia updates critical minerals financing priorities
summary: Australia's critical minerals policy update emphasized midstream processing, offtake resilience, and support for lithium supply chains.

title: Lithium market watches Chinese converter margins
summary: Converters in China reported margin pressure, keeping spot demand cautious despite signs of battery restocking.

title: Pilgangoora expansion permitting remains a key watch item
summary: Analysts flagged permitting, water access, and contractor availability as execution risks for the next Pilgangoora growth phase.
